Name: adamaurelio-security-headers
Comment: Security headers for the static site. Keep in sync with nginx.conf (QA).

Items.Value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
